name: ImpactAlpha
notes: ImpactAlpha's feed blocks some automated fetchers. If it returns nothing after deploy, try the topic feed https://impactalpha.com/browse/impact-investing/feed/ instead.

notes: Emerging-markets social enterprise & impact investing news. Good fit; verified returning items.

notes: Impact Investment Exchange — women/underserved, emerging markets. Verified returning items.

notes: UK industry body news feed. Reputable; confirm it returns items after first run.
